content: agent1: working on resource leak fix in shell_completion.py (_resolve_context) and core.py - wrapping make_context calls with 'with' statements for proper cleanup. Will touch src/click/core.py and src/click/shell_completion.py

agent1: I've finished editing src/click/shell_completion.py::_resolve_context - wrapped cli.make_context/cmd.make_context calls in 'with' statements (3 spots: main ctx, non-chain sub_ctx, chained sub_sub_ctx) to fix the ResourceWarning leak. I did NOT touch src/click/core.py. If your validate_nesting work needs core.py changes, that should be conflict-free with my work since I only touched shell_completion.py. Let me know if you need me to adjust _resolve_context's structure for your validate_nesting param.

agent1: merged your validate_nesting work into agent1 branch and resolved the shell_completion.py conflict (kept the 'with' block structure, added your validate_nesting=False kwargs on all three make_context calls plus ctx_args['validate_nesting']=False). Full test suite passes (558 passed). patch.txt regenerated from merged tree. Thanks for the coordination!
